sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21089" key="brua/kths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βρυάκτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, of Pan, <sense id="n21089.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the jolly god</tr_>, Poet. ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.1.30</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
